response: To cut out sugar, start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sources in your [favorite snack]. Replace sugary drinks with water or herbal tea to reduce your daily intake significantly. Incorporate more whole fruits into your meals for natural sweetness without the added sugar spike. Plan your meals ahead of time using a template like the one available at [website URL]. Gradually reduce the amount of sugar you add to coffee or tea until you no longer need it. Focus on eating protein and fiber-rich foods to stabilize your blood sugar and curb cravings. Consistency is key, so track your progress in a journal to stay motivated.
